query:
INSERT INTO leader_leases (name, holder_id, heartbeat_at, expires_at)
         VALUES ($1, $2, NOW(), $3)
         ON CONFLICT (name) DO UPDATE
           SET holder_id = $2, heartbeat_at = NOW(), expires_at = $3
           WHERE leader_leases.expires_at < NOW()
              OR leader_leases.holder_id = $2
